mapper.sql: id, application_id, gender, birth_date, address, marital_status, education_level, occupation, employer_name, annual_income, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO applicant_profile (application_id, gender, birth_date, address, marital_status, education_level, occupation, employer_name, annual_income, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{address}, #{maritalStatus}, #{educationLevel}, #{occupation}, #{employerName}, #{annualIncome}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE applicant_profile SET gender=#{gender}, birth_date=#{birthDate}, address=#{address}, marital_status=#{maritalStatus}, education_level=#{educationLevel}, occupation=#{occupation}, employer_name=#{employerName}, annual_income=#{annualIncome}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE application_id=#{applicationId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM applicant_profile WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
